title: COMPOST: ADVANTAGES AND DISADVANTAGES
subtitle: This factsheet contains complementary information to the Best4Soil video on Compost: Advantages and Disadvantages
description: A factsheet outlines the beneficial effects of compost on soil health, including increased organic matter, microbial diversity, nutrient availability, disease suppression, and improved resilience. It also discusses quality concerns, contamination risks, availability limitations, and the cost and equipment requirements associated with composting.
